title: TE Connectivity (TEL) Q4 Earnings & Sales Beat, Rise Y/Y
text: TE Connectivity's (TEL) results for the fiscal fourth quarter reflect benefits from solid momentum across the transportation, communications and industrial solution segments.

title: TE Connectivity Ltd. (TEL) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: TE Connectivity Ltd. (NYSE:TEL ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call November 2, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Sujal Shah - VP, IR Terrence Curtin - CEO Heath Mitts - CFO Conference Call Participants David Kelley - Jefferies Wamsi Mohan - Bank of America Steven Fox - Fox Advisors Matt Sheerin - Stifel Amit Daryanani - Evercore ISI Chris Snyder - UBS Joe Spak - RBC Capital Markets Mark Delaney - Goldman Sachs Jim Suva - Citigroup Shreyas Patil - Wolfe Research Luke Junk - Baird Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by, and welcome to the TE Connectivity Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Call.

title: TE Connectivity (TEL) Beats Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: TE Connectivity (TEL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0.53% and 3.40%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Currency, Cloud, Cost Inflation. TE Connectivity's Earnings Show Economy's Problems.
text: Auto and communications equipment supplier TE Connectivity reports better- than-expected earnings. Guidance for the current quarter, however, falls well short of expectations.

title: Get Ready To Buy Stocks Again This Month (Including These 11)
text: November already is known as the S&P 500's second-best month of the year. And this November, some stocks have even more power.
